approval_phrase: 批准晋升R17并执行活动指针CAS更新

github_actions_exception.reason: All observed Actions jobs failed before any executable steps, logs, or artifacts were recorded; activation evidence relies on immutable Git-blob readback, deterministic local reconstruction, and repository-only causal shadow PASS.

merge_policy.reason: PR history contains hundreds of engineering commits; squash merge preserves reviewed final tree while avoiding promotion of the historical commit chain as runtime history.
